title: 4 Refining & Marketing MLP Stocks on Solid Ground

title: Top Picks: 3 Stocks That (Almost) All Analysts Agree On
text: Regarding the best stocks to buy, some investors look to analyst consensus stocks — companies that everyone on Wall Street fawns over. I did a quick Finviz.com screen of S&P 500 companies.

title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend and Timing of Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Webcast
text: HOUSTON, July 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced its quarterly dividend on common shares with respect to the second quarter of 2023.

title: Energy Income Weekly: The Week's Price Action Bodes Well For The Second Half
text: Energy shares traded aimlessly on low volume until indicators pointed to a tightening oil market late in the week. Friday saw dramatic outperformance in response to improving oil market fundamentals despite heightened macro concerns. The late-week price action suggests further oil market tightening will push oil-related equities higher over the coming months.
